issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing channels or concurrent updates.

scenarios.name: Team chat schema with cursor pagination
scenarios.rationale: Baseline orders by created_at and paginates with OFFSET (the documented anti-pattern) and lacks channel_members/last_read_message_id; treatment uses BIGSERIAL messages.id, WHERE id < cursor, and the (channel_id, id DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL index.

scenarios.name: Unread counts plus reconnection sync
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tracks reads per-message in a separate table, ignoring soft deletes and sender exclusion; treatment uses one last_read_message_id integer per (channel, user) with the documented JOIN, sender_id filter, and lastMessageIds reconnection protocol.
